title: Everbuild 501 Universal PVA Bond ‚Äì General Purpose Bonding Agent ‚Äì 5 Litre, White (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
MULTI-USE ADHESIVE ‚Äì Use as a general purpose adhesive for wood, cork, paper, and textiles. Also suitable for use as an internal filler when mixed with wood shavings or plaster.
VERSATILE ‚Äì Ideal for use as an admixture for internal mortar and renders. Provides increased flexibility in sand cement products, improved frost resistance, and reduced risk of salt permeation.
SAFE TO USE ‚Äì Meets the bond strength requirements of BS5270. Contains no harmful phthalates.

EASY TO APPLY ‚Äì Simply apply on a clean, dry, grease-free surface. Depending on the surface and the intended application, for priming, dilute with 4 parts water: 1 part emulsion to seal the surface in preparation for further coating.
RANGE OF SIZES ‚Äì Also available in sizes of 500ml, 1 litre, 2.5 litre, and 25 litre
